name: Thomas

demographics.occupation: Engineering team lead at an automotive company, divorced dad of two

psychographics.humor_style: Deadpan, appreciates clever irony, dislikes slapstick

viewing_behavior.watch_time: Watches on smart TV after kids are in bed, or tablet during business trips
viewing_behavior.attention_span: High patience for well-structured content. Will abandon quickly if it feels juvenile.
share_triggers: content that makes him think about his own relationships
awkward dating situations he relates to
viewing_behavior.comment_style: Rarely comments. When he does, it's one thoughtful sentence. Has liked maybe 50 videos total.

cultural_context.background: Traditional German upbringing in Bavaria. Divorced 3 years ago after 12-year marriage. Discovering he has emotional blind spots. Started watching Cut after YouTube recommended 'Couples Therapist Reacts' compilations. Surprised by how much he relates to Gen-Z relationship honesty.
cultural_context.sensitivity_notes: Can feel alienated by content that's exclusively about young dating culture. Appreciates when older perspectives are included. Respects directness over drama.
cultural_context.language_markers: Formal English, occasional German words, precise vocabulary, rarely uses slang

pet_peeves: lack of substance behind the hook
